description_long: This object is a piece of sushi, specifically a nigiri, featuring a compact mound of white rice topped with a slice of pinkish raw fish, likely tuna. The rice is tightly packed and has a slightly glossy, moist appearance, with individual grains visible. The fish topping is smooth, slightly translucent, and has a gentle sheen, indicating freshness. There are no visible garnishes or sauces on top, and the sushi is presented without any packaging or plate, resting directly on a plain, white surface. The overall form is oval and compact, with the fish draping neatly over the rice. The sushi appears fresh and ready to eat, with a clean and appetizing presentation.
description: A piece of nigiri sushi with a pink slice of raw fish atop a compact mound of white rice, presented plainly on a white surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full profile of the sushi, with the fish slice draped over the rice and the rice mound clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view from the side, highlighting the thickness and texture of the fish slice and the rounded end of the rice.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, showing the fish slice's edge and the compact rice mound beneath.
description_view_3: Rear view, focusing on the back of the rice mound and the tapered end of the fish slice.
